columns.name: JOURNAL_RECNO
columns.description: Unique record identifier for journal entries

columns.name: THERMO_STATUS
columns.description: Current status of thermal resistance incident

columns.name: VANNPROS_MIN
columns.description: Minimum water pressure value in the incident

columns.name: VANNPROS_MAX
columns.description: Maximum water pressure value in the incident

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Detailed comments related to the thermal resistance incident

columns.name: TS_STATUS_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the status of the incident

columns.name: TESTSTATUS
columns.description: Test-related status or condition of the incident

columns.name: PREL_RECEPT_DAT
columns.description: Date related to pre-receipt information for the incident

columns.name: STATUS_DATUM
columns.description: Date when the status of the incident was recorded or changed

columns.name: SAA_DATO
columns.description: Date related to SAA (possibly a specific process or event) for the incident

columns.name: ANKOMST_DATO
columns.description: Date when the incident was received or arrived

columns.name: OPPTELLINGS_DATO
columns.description: Date when the incident was registered in the system
